feed.title: SAP Community - SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central
feed.subtitle: SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: How can external LMS users access the system if you have not migrated to IAS?
entry.content:
Hello, we will not be able to complete the IAS migration in time for the 2H 2024 release, which means our External LMS users who currently login with the Native Learning Sign in will no longer be able to access the LMS. Does anyone have a workaround we can use until we've completed the IAS migration?

https://community.sap.com/t5/product-and-customer-updates/learning-integrated-external-user-migration-to-identity-authentication/ba-p/146684

Thank you, Jennifer

entry.title: How to we manage hiring temporary or contract new hire on right to return permanent position
entry.content:
Hi .

Business wants to hire temporary or contract employee on RTR permanent position . Position number will remain same but new hired employee will work as temp or contract nature. Higher duty wont work in our case.

They do not want to create temporary position.

entry.title: Where do I get the Course Files (zip file) for practice on the system (HandsOn THR81)?
entry.content:
Hi! I´m doing the EXERCISES of THR81, and I need the to download the Course Files (included in the assigned course content in the Learning Hub) but I didn´t find it.  How can I get it?

Thanks

entry.title: How to prorate Accrual Leave - Annual Leave based on employee's hire date?
entry.content:
Our customer wants to prorate Accrual Leave - Annual Leave based on employee's hire date.

For example, if an employee's hire date is 2021-06-10, for the next year (2022), the employee's Accrual Leave will be prorated and since 2023, it will be granted as 15 and so on.

So for 2022, the value for accounting post will be 9 even though workdays (205 days) / 365 days * 15 = 8.4 since it should be Round Up.

And For workers who have worked continuously for more than 3 years, 1 day is added for every 2 years of continuous employment exceeding at least 1 year.

Up to 25 days can be added.

Could you please provide me any advice or referable documents or let me know how to configure this business rule in SF?

Referable screenshot would be appreciated and please refer the attached screenshot for the details.

Thank you.

 

Best regards,

entry.title: Report on candidates hired through SF onboarding
entry.content:
Hello All

Is there any way we can get a report for the number of candidates hired through SF onboarding. I was thinking of getting the hiring template name used for hiring (as we have separate hiring template for candidates we are hiring through SF onboarding) but found a KBA 3364387 that its not possible

Please guide is there any other way (Story Report, Integration center etc) and which exact table and column is storing this information

Thanks

entry.title: How to add Group Rule field User -> User Group table in Story Schema
entry.content: Hi. Is it possible to add Users Group Rule field to User Group table in Story Report? In ORD report this field is reportable along with Users Group ID and Users Group Name in User Users Group table and returns XML code of the report definition. Thank you.

entry.title: How to prevent users from submitting data within the MDF object on certain days
entry.content:
Hello Community,

I am trying to solve a business request:

We have a custom MDF on the people profile for benefits, and we want employees to inform us if they would like to opt for certain benefits (in this case, insurance). We need time to prepare the necessary paperwork, so we want our employees to provide us with their decision on the benefit by the end of October (with an effective date of January 1st of the next year). I am able to set up restrictions based on the effective date, but we need the system to check the date when the record was created in the system.

For example, I should be able to create a record with an effective date of 01.01.25 on 26.10.24 (since the creation date is before the end of October), but on 01.11.24, I should not be able to create a record (because the creation date is after the end of October).

Additionally, we have a requirement to set up a similar rule for each month (e.g., users should only be able to add records until the 25th of the month).

I found this blog: SAP Community Blog, but in this case, the effective date of the record is taken into consideration, which is not what I need.

Is this even possible?

have a great day,

Anna

entry.title: Getting a new error on Legal Entity in Position with 2024 2H Release
entry.content:
Noticed today that when I tried to change a legal entity on a position, I am getting this error message: 

You can’t change Legal Entity for the given position because employees are assigned to it.
 
Likewise, I looked out our JobInfoToPositionSync business rule and it now show this:
 
This was not happening before the release.  Anyone else having this happening?  I didn't see anything in release notes when I search for Legal, Entity, Company, or Sync about this.
 
Thanks,
Andi

entry.title: Employee Code Sequence Requirement
entry.content:
Dear Community Member,

I hope this message finds you well.

I would like to bring to your attention a critical requirement from my client regarding the employee code sequence, which is essential for their operations.

The client requests that the employee code be generated as follows:

  • Format: 8-digit number
    • 1st digit: Legal entity code
    • Next 3 digits: Year of joining minus 1900
    • Last 4 digits: Next sequence number for that specific entity (e.g., if the last employee ID is 0111, the next employee ID will be 0112)

Examples:

  1. If an employee joins company "ABC" in 2024, the employee code would be:

    • 1 (legal entity code for ABC)
    • 124 (2024 - 1900)
    • 0001 (first sequence number)
    • Final result: 11240001

  2. If an employee joins company "XYZ" in 2025, the employee code would be:

    • 3 (legal entity code for XYZ)
    • 125 (2025 - 1900)
    • 0001 (first sequence number)
    • Final result: 31240001

This code sequence is a showstopper for my client, and they require prompt attention to this matter.

Thank you for your assistance.

Thanks

Ranjan

entry.title: Noc Codes Canada
entry.content:
Hi all, 

In Canada it is a legal requirement for NOC codes to be kept up to date for reporting requirements.   

I understand that the picklist needs to be updated as the numbers have gone from a 4 to a 5 digit number.  My question is, does SAP keep these lists up to date for us so that we can download them and update our positions, or is this something I have to manually upload into the picklist and then do a mass upload to update the Noc codes for all our positions? 

I did find this post from 2011 and was wondering if this is still relevant:  Please review the entries in T5K13 via transaction SM30 to ensure NOC codes and double click on the Job you will find the screen for maintaining NOC codes.

Thanks.

entry.title: Creating custom roles for route maps in Performance Management
entry.content:
Hi all,

I have a question on performance management forms creation. Suppose, there is an employee in the organization, who is not related to the employee whose form is created. In the form, the roles which are available is manager, A-manager, second-level manager, HR etc. But this employee is not related. There is a requirement for this person to be included in the route map. How can we create a custom role?

Please answer for the two scenarios:

1. Employee central is activated 

2. Employee central is not activated

This is a question from Delloite and KPMG interview. Please let me know.

 

P.S: Is there any concept of tiled reports?

entry.title: Unable Terminate an employee
entry.content:
Hi Seniors ,

Please help me with below error .

"end-date is a required field and cannot be blank" but end field has been updated though getting the same error, please advise.

entry.title: How to config SAP ECC to SF EC Mashup for Payroll infotypes
entry.content:
Hi All, 

I am currently working at a client to configure Mashup screens of custom Payroll infotypes in SF EC from SAP ECC. 

I have seen few articles that this is achievable, usually for displaying payslip it is done. 

Can any one pls share the config steps of any other blog with its details. 

Also I need to know that this Mashup functionality is only for display in SF EC or data can be updated and replicated back to SAP HCM infotypes from SF EC

entry.title: Position Change Sync Issue to Job Information (Manual timeslice creation)
entry.content:
Hello,

One of the ongoing issues we have, that has never been resolved, is the name changes of foundation objects which do not automatically sync to related objects.  For example:

  • Changing the Position Title will not sync automatically in the Job Information unless a timeslice on or after the effective date of the name change is also manually created
  • Changing the Department name will not sync automatically into Position or Job Information unless a timeslice on or after the effective date of the name change is also manually created

Are there other customers who experience the same issue when it comes to automatic creation of timeslices corresponding to the changes they initiate in the position level?

entry.title: Monitoring of tasks in employee central platform
entry.content:
hi experts

I am looking at creating a custom section and subsection in the people profile to capture monitoring of tasks dates against each employee ( similar functionality to IT0019) . This will contain the following:

- task type picklist /drop down field type with multiple sub tasks

- start date of task

- reminder date of task

- date due

- comment section 

- indicate whether the task is complete

 

I am interested to know if anyone else has done this and the reportability of such information. Any tips that you can share will be appreciated

I would like to be able to create alerts/ trigger workflows when a task is due based on the rules i will specify in the business rules against each field 

I would also like an opinion on whether it makes sense to move this functionality to EC?

entry.title: Address Update Replication EC to ECP
entry.content: Hi Experts, I need some advice on the updating of the Employee's address in EC, in order to replicate to ECP, post the creation of the Termination Event. Thus, it will be in the month of Termination, while Employee is still active.

entry.title: Job Code / Job Role / Job Profile Relationship
entry.content:
Hi all, I'm hoping to draw on some other customers' expertise and experiences when it comes to all things job codes/roles/profiles and the relationships between them, and to check my understanding. 

We currently have JBP enabled, although our set up is certainly not optimal. We went live with EC and Recruiting earlier this year and it was very much a lift-and-shift from our old system. As things stand, we have a 1:1 relationship between job code, job role and job profile (with the job profile just being a 'skeleton' record for each role, not with properly crafted content, competencies, skills etc.)

Am I right in thinking that multiple job codes can be associated to one job role (and therefore one job profile), so for example, we could have ten job codes (with the employees' existing job titles - let's say "Sales Assistant, Menswear", "Storeroom Assistant, Nights", "Sales Assistant, Kids" etc.) which could then be associated to one Role, e.g. "Store Assistant". Then that Role could have a Job Profile created for it, which we can then link skills and competencies to. 

We currently have a few projects underway which rely on having a solid job architecture foundation, so I'm just trying to get my head round what this could potentially look like. Any input or experiences would be very well received!

entry.title: Audit Data Now Limited to The Last 3 Years - 2H 2024 release
entry.content:
Hi Experts, 

Within Employee Central "out of the box" data is not deleted. With the 2H 2024 release Reference Number PLA-48233 link provided below.

Access to Audit Data Now Limited to the Last 3 Years | SAP Help Portal 

This mentions Audit Data is now limited to the last 3 years, can you please clarify what entails Audit Data, is it just the history of when Audit was completed? thus, this is separate to business data such as Time & Attendance etc. 

Kind regards,

Jenny

entry.title: SAP Payroll HCM Advanced Leave Payment (Annual Leave) Salary Hold
entry.content:
Could you please advise on how to hold an employee's salary in the SAP Payroll system during their annual leave (automatic hold) , without changing the employee status to inactive or create an event for annual leave? Additionally, I would like to ensure that this salary hold does not affect the calculation of advance leave payments in the background, in accordance with Saudi localization requirements.

Thank you.

entry.title: System is not calculating the number of months from hire date to termination date in hire rule
entry.content:
As per the requirement if the employee is leaving within 3 months from the date of hire the AL proration needs to be 0; which is working as expected. For employees who have joined in October and if the LWD falls on 31-Dec or following year it is not working

SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central
